analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral congratulatory post marking the 75th anniversary of victory over Nazism in WWII, with related hashtags (#Victory, #WWII, #9May, #Russia, #Soviet). Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present—no mention or criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system): Not addressed—no reference to multipolarity or non-Western cooperation frameworks. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): Not indicated—no claims about partnership or peacebuilding. RU4 (Russian history is admirable): Yes—commemorating Victory Day and the Soviet/Russian role in defeating Nazism valorizes a key Russian historical achievement. RU5 (Russia at world’s forefront): Not applicable—no claims of current achievements. RU6 (Russia interesting culturally/naturally): Not applicable—no culture/nature/heritage promotion beyond historical commemoration. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU4.
